decisions.title_en: Microsoft to launch Project Perception AI security tool rivaling Anthropic Mythos

decisions.title_en: DeepSeek eyes $74B valuation raise ahead of STAR Market IPO
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. Seeking ~50B yuan at 500B yuan ($74B) valuation, prepping onshore Shanghai listing.

decisions.title_en: Toyota-backed Walden Robotics exits stealth with $300M at $1.1B
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. MIT/Russ Tedrake spinout from Toyota Research; robot already doing 8-hr shifts at a Toyota plant.

decisions.title_en: Alibaba leads $439M Series C for AI video startup PixVerse/AIsphere
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. $439M round pushes valuation past $2B; Chinese giants racing into interactive world models.

decisions.title_en: Hacked Suno source code reveals mass song scraping
